speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think my briefcase is big enough to put in all these stuff ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Let me see . Laptop , flash disk , a ballpoint pen , a pencil , a notebook , a pair of glasses , cell phone , charger , moisture lotion , ... Oh , that is too much . You are not going to a business trip .

speaker: speaker1
text: I guess I need all of them .

speaker: speaker2
text: Actually , the company will provide you with all of these supplies . So , you can leave this very thick notebook at home .

speaker: speaker1
text: I know . But it is my lucky charm . I carry it all the time .

speaker: speaker2
text: Suit yourself . Don ’ t forget to set the alarm clock .
